creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
A peculiarity of the default, split view. 

<https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/handbook/partiv/> for example, there's no list of chapters; and 

<https://archive.ph/FoiiD#40%> foot of the page, the Part is not visible in the sidebar, then (especially when trying to navigate with e.g. the scroll ring of a trackball) it's difficult to tell where the Part begins. UX: paper cut. 

True: there's the 'Next' button, but this is no substitute for an in-page listing. 

<https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/handbook/partv/> is comparably strange.
